instruction: Write a Common Lisp macro `validate-plist` that evaluates a plist once and signals an error if any of the required keys is missing (its GETF lookup is nil); otherwise returns the plist.
original_failure_log_excerpt:
MISMATCH
EXPECTED: (LET ((#:G1 OPTS))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G1 :HOST) (ERROR "Missing key ~S" :HOST))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G1 :PORT) (ERROR "Missing key ~S" :PORT))
            #:G1)
ACTUAL:   (LET ((#:G112 OPTS))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G112 :HOST) (ERROR "Missing key ~S" :HOST))
            (UNLESS (GETF #:G112 :PORT) (ERROR "Missing key ~S" :PORT))
            #:G112)

--- stderr ---
